title: Employee of the Month
description: Recognized as Employee of the Month (Dec 2024) at Celigo for high-impact engineering contributions, including feature delivery and resolution of critical customer-facing issues.

title: Code Gladiators 2023 by TechGig
description: Secured 83rd rank in the finale, outperforming over 3.15 lakh participants in one of India's largest coding competitions.

title: Tally CodeBrewers Hackathon
description: Attained finalist recognition competing among over 12,000 participants in the hackathon organized by Tally Solutions.

title: Geek Goddess 2023 by TechGig
description: Secured 272nd rank in the finale, outperforming over 59,000 participants in this women-focused coding competition.
